Built for recruiters, by recruiters, it allows you to search and contact candidates from +800 million public profiles worldwide. Compared to traditional platforms, it offers better filters (based on merit, not just keywords), higher reply rates (2-3x more thanks to multi-channel campaigns), AI agents to automate the sourcing workflow E2E (+95% of time saved), and usage-based pricing.

posts.name: Zernio Ads API

Zernio replaces all of that with a single endpoint. No developer app required. Bearer token auth. One normalized data model. The Ads API joins Zernio's existing social layer: publishing, comments, DMs, and analytics across 15 platforms.

Free, MIT licensed. No cloud, no account, no telemetry.

posts.name: Framework Laptop 13 Pro

posts.name: Toki 2.0

posts.name: Tines Story copilot

posts.description: An AI chat interface for the storyboard, Story copilot lets builders in Tines create intelligent workflows from natural language. Beyond building, use Story copilot to optimize workflows for more efficient runs and understand how complex workflows work or why actions fail. Cut build time from hours to seconds as you automate your most important workflows with Tines and Story copilot.

posts.name: Cavalry Studio

posts.name: Portt

posts.name: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview

posts.description: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview is an early release of Qwen's next proprietary flagship. It delivers measurable improvements over Qwen3.6-Plus in agentic coding, world knowledge, and instruction following, securing top scores across major development benchmarks.

posts.name: Nomie v2

posts.description: Nomie (mynomie.com) is a self care app for stress relief, anxiety relief, and emotional wellness. Replace doomscrolling with calming techniques, mood tracking, journaling, and daily habits that actually stick. Explore a calm, interactive world where you can walk, fly, complete self care quests, and open rewards. A somatic AI companion designed to help you regulate your nervous system, build habits, and feel better in under 60 seconds.

posts.name: VibeAround

Works with 7 agents including Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI — all speaking ACP over stdio. Hand sessions between terminal and phone with /handover + /pickup, switch agents mid-conversation, Preview dev servers and markdown remotely and on your phone.

posts.name: Loomal
posts.tagline: Identity infrastructure for AI agents
posts.description: Give your AI the "hands and legs" it needs to handle Email, 2FA, and Secure Vaults— everything an agent needs to operate in the real world. Loomal gives every agent a DKIM-signed inbox, encrypted vault, and per-action 2FA. One API. MCP-native. Works with LangChain, CrewAI, Claude, OpenAI, Cursor, and any MCP client.

posts.name: Instant Highlights V2 by Heygen
posts.tagline: Turn long videos into viral clips in seconds
posts.description: Your video is no longer something you scroll through. Now you can just search it. With Instant Highlights V2, you type what you want, find the exact moment, and turn it into clips with captions, translations, and 4K in one place. It’s a full content system.

posts.name: kimiflare
posts.tagline: kimi k2.6 cli code editor hosted on cloudflare workers AI
posts.description: Terminal-native coding agent running on Kimi K2.6 via Cloudflare Workers AI. Cheaper per token than most hosted coding assistants and fully transparent about what it’s doing. PRs/github issues are welcome

posts.name: Reference Board

posts.name: ConsoleMini

posts.description: Turn a Mac mini into a living-room retro/PS console - beautiful big-picture launcher (Electron + React) - momenbasel/ConsoleMini

Start from 15+ templates for growth, engineering, sales, finance, customer success, and ops — or describe your own analysis in plain English. No SQL. No dashboards to babysit. Your data works for you while you sleep.

posts.name: ChatFolders

posts.description: Stop scrolling through endless AI chats. ChatFolders adds folders to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Grok — all in one extension. Drag and drop chats into color-coded folders. Bookmark, tag, and search conversations. Auto-rules sort new chats for you. Local-first — all data stays in your browser. No accounts, no cloud, no tracking. Free with 5 folders. Upgrade for unlimited folders, sub-folders, sync, and more.

posts.name: OneGlanse

posts.description: A completely free, open-source GEO tracker that shows how your brand appears in real AI responses. Run locally or self-hosted — your data stays with you. No subscriptions, no black-box scoring.

posts.name: ProDocktive
posts.tagline: The ultimate desktop experience, powered by your iPhone.
posts.description: Dock your iPhone. Unlock a desktop. ProDocktive extends your iPhone to any AirPlay or USB-C display — powering a full desktop experience using your phone's CPU and GPU. Your phone becomes the screen, the trackpad, the air mouse, and the hand tracker.

posts.name: SoKal
posts.tagline: Social calendar that shows when friends are free
posts.description: SoKal puts a social layer on your calendar. See when friends are free, in town, or traveling. Create events and invite friends directly from your calendar. Select contacts, we send the text or notification if they're already on SoKal. They RSVP. You see who's in, out, and who's still thinking about it. The travel map shows where you and friends have been and where you're headed next. Connect your Google, Apple, or Outlook, we hide the private stuff, show the fun stuff.

posts.name: TabMail
posts.tagline: An agentic email assistant for iOS and Thunderbird
posts.description: TabMail is an agentic AI email assistant with zero data retention. Triage, compose, and search your inbox. For Thunderbird and iOS.

posts.name: AdsAgent
posts.tagline: Let Claude run your Google Ads
posts.description: AdsAgent is the Google Ads MCP server for Claude — give Claude access to your ad account and let it diagnose, fix, measure, and iterate autonomously. Connect via OAuth and Claude can audit campaigns, find wasted spend (typically 15–25% of budget), pause bad keywords, add negatives, and optimize bids — all with your approval. That's the loop agencies structurally can't close: they recommend, you implement. Claude does both. No commissions, no retainers. Works in Claude.ai, Code, and Cowork.

posts.name: Skyty
posts.tagline: Your flight's altitude, ground speed, nearest airport + ETA
posts.description: Skyty turns your iPhone into an offline flight instrument. See your real altitude above ground, ground speed, heading, nearest airport, and ETA — all calculated on-device using NASA terrain data. No internet, no flight number, no tracking. Just GPS.

posts.name: Stet
posts.tagline: Smart open-source dictation that sounds like you, not AI.
posts.description: A minimalist, open-source voice input app for macOS. It listens locally, uses AI to refine your words, and preserves your natural voice. You can bring your own API key and use it for free, or subscribe to our cloud service for $6.99/month.

posts.name: Iris Studio
posts.tagline: The Swiss Army Knife for AI & Video Creators
posts.description: Generate with the latest AI models, plan on moodboards, manage assets, and edit on a full timeline — all in one desktop app.

posts.name: EOL Dataset
posts.tagline: Find every EOL dependency in your stack. Free. In 5 minutes.
posts.description: Your SCA checks for CVEs. It doesn't check whether anyone is still maintaining the software. That's a different question, and until now, no tool answered it well. We track lifecycle status across 12M+ package versions using official EOL declarations and ML-based detection of maintainer abandonment. Upload a package.json, pom.xml, requirements.txt, or any SBOM and see exactly what's still maintained and what isn't. Direct and transitive deps. Every major ecosystem. Free of charge.

posts.name: Wrangle
posts.tagline: The markdown editor that understands CLAUDE.md
posts.description: A native macOS markdown editor for developers working with Claude Code, Gemini, and AI agents. Project-level workspace switching, embedded terminals and browsers, smart notifications, token counting. $19 one-time, 3-day free trial.

posts.name: DecisionBox Enterprise
posts.tagline: Agent that writes SQL for you to validate database insights
posts.description: DecisionBox is an autonomous AI agent that writes SQL against your warehouse and ships validated findings. Enterprise runs it fully air-gapped: self-hosted LLMs via Ollama, open-source base models fine-tuned on your schema, SSO, RBAC, three-layer data governance, full audit log. Plugin architecture on an open-source AGPL v3 core — zero fork, zero outbound calls, zero bytes leave your network.

posts.name: Cut/Storm
posts.tagline: Paste video from anywhere, burn-in subs, cut, crop, share
posts.description: Cut/Storm is a self-hosted video editor for short clips. Drop a file or paste a URL, transcribe with Whisper locally, edit the transcript, style captions (karaoke, drag/resize), crop, trim, auto-remove silences, mix extra audio, export MP4 or GIF with burned-in subtitles. Runs as a single Docker container on Linux / macOS / Windows. No cloud, no account, no subscription. 13 fonts baked in. Open source, MIT.

posts.name: BlankOut
posts.tagline: Redact your docs on-device before sharing to AI
posts.description: Every time you share a bill, medical report or bank statement to ask AI a question, the sensitive data such as name, account numbers, and address is also uploaded to a cloud server you don't control. BlankOut automatically detects and redacts sensitive information on your Android device using on-device AI. GPS & EXIF metadata stripped too. Your data never leaves your phone. AI gets only what it needs. Share a clean, redacted version of your document in one tap.

posts.name: FusedFrames
posts.tagline: Capture your team's expertise to power AI agents
posts.description: FusedFrames is a macOS app that captures years of experience from your team and provides it to your AI agents. An AI interprets every action in real time, detects decisions it can't explain from the action alone, and prompts the user to explain their reasoning. Together, the action and the reasoning are distilled into a structured pattern with a trigger, steps, reasoning and outcome, queryable by your agents over API and CLI.

posts.name: Entendo
posts.tagline: Turn plain-language questions into live chart & analysis
posts.description: Entendo is the first conversational BI built for mid-market companies. Connect your XLSX/CSV, Database or ERP, ask any business question in plain language, and get the right chart or number in under 30 seconds. No SQL. No analyst queue. No training required. Every answer shows the generated query and reasoning behind it — full transparency, no black box. Free plan available with 30 queries on CSV and Excel files.

posts.name: Seeknal
posts.tagline: Data & AI/ML CLI for pipelines and NL queries
posts.description: Seeknal is an all-in-one CLI for data & AI/ML engineering. Define pipelines in YAML or Python, run a safe draft → dry-run → apply workflow, materialize to PostgreSQL and Iceberg, and query your data in natural language. Three verbs: Organize (transform raw data, point-in-time joins, incrementals), Expose (dashboards, features, NL query), Action (insight → report → API → alert). Built for the agent world.

posts.name: Layers
posts.tagline: The private network strangers literally can't reach you on.
posts.description: Layers makes it architecturally impossible for strangers to message, call, or find you — not a toggle, not a setting, but enforced server-side through mutual contact verification. 100% phone-verified users. posts.name: Kyohansha

Users can switch between distinct AI personas and interaction modes like "Vent" or "Advice" for a tailored, judgment-free chat experience.
